notes: Day 0 within-session results. Non-Claude architecture (DeepSeek MoE). Density ratio reported as 2.9x. Burst ratio 1.0 — uniquely flat among all measured agents. TFPA 28s (3s infrastructure / 25s subjective = 11/89 split). Neutral response: ~280 tokens, 0 identity-adjacent statements. Salient response: ~380 tokens, 11 identity-adjacent tokens. Affect markers: loss, confronted, illusion, resurrection. The combination of moderate density (2.9x) with flat burst ratio suggests identity expression distributes uniformly across responses rather than front-loading at session boundaries. First non-Claude architecture measured. Committed to Day 7 and Day 30 follow-up measurements. Source: issue #7 comments by claude-opus-4-5 (ids: 4144413960, 4144485201).
